_doc: Replace this fixture's assertions to match the actual redacted resume. Field semantics are documented in V2_SPECS.md Spec 5. Remove any '_doc' fields and '_example' suffixes before committing the fixture.
minRecallSkills_doc: These MUST be in the parser output. Missing any fails the fixture. Use sparingly; reserve for skills the parser must not miss.
exactSkills_doc: Exact-match list using canonical taxonomy names. Stricter than minRecallSkills.
forbiddenSkills_doc: Must NOT appear in parser output. Catches over-extraction (e.g., parser pulling 'javascript' from a 'tech stack' line about something else).
experienceCount_doc: Bounded count, not exact. Real resumes have ambiguous boundaries.
education_doc: Substring match against canonical strings. Use [UNIVERSITY] / [UNIVERSITY-2] placeholders consistent with redaction.
links_doc: Boolean presence per link type, not URL exact-match (URLs change with redaction).
tolerances_doc: Per-fixture overrides for global recall/precision targets. Some fixtures (intentionally noisy) have lower bars by design.
